skills.name: skill-reviewer
skills.description: Review Skill quality against 10 best practices. Use when user says 'review this skill', 'check skill quality', 'audit skill design', 'skill code review'. Supports automated checks and auto-fix.
skills.author: liwuhou

skills.name: multi-agent
skills.description: Coordinate multiple agents to execute tasks in parallel. Use when user says 'use multiple agents in parallel', 'split task', 'concurrent execution', 'do multiple things at the same time'. Supports task splitting, isolated execution, and flexible merge strategies.
skills.author: liwuhou

skills.name: codex-verify
skills.description: Use OpenAI Codex CLI to verify and review code written by Claude. Invoke when you want a second opinion on code quality, cross-check for bugs, or validate work before committing. Triggers on 'verify', 'validate', 'codex review', 'double-check', 'let codex check this'.
skills.author: liwuhou
